_comment: Copy to app-secrets.json (git-ignored) and fill in. Mounted read-only into the backend at /app/app-secrets.json. Keys map to the backend's IOptions settings.
_email_note: Netcup blocks outbound SMTP, so prod uses Provider=Resend (HTTPS API). Requires a Resend account with the sending domain verified (DKIM/SPF in Infomaniak DNS) and ResendApiKey. For SMTP environments set Provider=Smtp + the Smtp* fields instead.
_google_note: Login uses Google ID-token validation (no client SECRET needed). These are validation audiences and ALL THREE keys must be present (the handler reads them with a non-null assertion). If you have no separate Android/iOS OAuth clients, set those to the same web ClientId or to "". Also add https://www.rumirestaurant.ch to the OAuth client's Authorized JavaScript origins in Google Cloud console.
